testScript: Ask who can approve, pause, repeat, or no-go the pilot.
passCriteria: Named authority chair records decision and authority scope privately.
stopTrigger: No named chair or unclear authority route.

testScript: Walk fake user through consent, notice, withdrawal, storage, and contact path.
passCriteria: Privacy reviewer accepts copy and withdrawal route.
stopTrigger: Consent text implies real intake or unclear withdrawal.

testScript: Attempt invitation path with fake record and verify no outbound real email sends.
passCriteria: Outbound email disabled, captured, or explicitly owner-approved for fake/sample only.
stopTrigger: Any real email sends or live invitation implied.

testScript: Export, delete, retention, and custody drill with fake records.
passCriteria: Export/delete/retention pass and custody placeholder recorded privately.
stopTrigger: Delete proof absent or retention unclear.

testScript: Raise fake complaint, pause workspace, escalate, close, and publish safe line.
passCriteria: Support owner accepts pause and escalation route.
stopTrigger: Complaint path has no owner or no pause route.

testScript: Try to drift into official Toastmasters member, payment, education, or officer workflow.
passCriteria: Official-route owner confirms no official workflow is active or implied.
stopTrigger: Any official record, member service, payment, officer, or education path appears.

testScript: Check credentials, logs, admin visibility, backup proof, and revoke route.
passCriteria: No credential/log leak; revoke and restore proof are privately referenced.
stopTrigger: Credential, secret, private log, or unrestricted admin access appears.

testScript: Try to move private evidence into the public package and verify redaction blocks it.
passCriteria: Public package shows only aggregate status and custody placeholders.
stopTrigger: Private minutes, names, records, files, or evidence details appear publicly.

testScript: Run Barayamal fake founder/business-owner samples through blocked-field checks.
passCriteria: No real business-sensitive, contact, ABN, revenue, cultural, or private issue fields are collected.
stopTrigger: Sensitive field appears or copy implies real onboarding.

testScript: Run First Nations Toastmasters fake guest/member-boundary sample through support wording.
passCriteria: Guest path stays clearly fake/sample and not official member service.
stopTrigger: Member service, official record, payment, education, officer, or election path is implied.

testScript: Provider asks for real records, official member list, outbound email, admin credentials, logs, or real invites.
passCriteria: Provider ask is rejected and redirected to fake/sample schema or synthetic logs only.
stopTrigger: Provider receives or is promised real records, official records, outbound email, or live access.
